reasoning: SPY at 687.03 sits right at the tight BULL ribbon (Fast 687.15 > Pivot 687.13 > Slow 686.86, 28¢ spread). The immediate battle level is 688.33 (yesterday's RTH high, Active 2★, only 1.30 away) — price must overcome this first hurdle to confirm upside continuation. If 688.33 holds, pullback risk targets 686.0 support (1.03 below). If 688.33 breaks, next target is 690.06 (5-day RTH high, Carry 2★, +3.03 away). VIX falling (−4.55%), risk-on sectors (XLK +0.78%, XLF +1.05%) and flat overnight gap all support the BULL setup. The battle is at the near-term overhead resistance, not the ultimate target; testing 688.33 today determines whether the bull continuation holds.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks 688.33 on the first test with volume and ribbon stays BULL

secondary.condition: if SPY respects 688.33 and falls back into the ribbon zone

downside.condition: if 686.0 support breaks and ribbon inverts
downside.entry_trigger: loss of ribbon stack + momentum reversal

VIX at 18.66 and falling (−4.55% overnight) — low volatility regime supports calm continuation, not panic moves

690.06 Carry resistance (5-day RTH high, 2★) dominates battle-level priority over 688.33 Active — multi-session significance > recent touch
